Notice To Correct Mistake By Plaintiff
Off Calendar Nov-30-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances by both sides.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:PLAINTIFF TYRONE YOUNGS Notice To Correct Mistake By Plaintiff is taken OFF-CALENDAR. Insufficient notice per C.C.P. 1005 and 1013. In addition, the request is moot because an Order Sustaining Demurrer with Leave to Amend was entered on Nov. 10, 2015.
Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk:N. Wong, Not Reported, D501.

Notice To Correct Mistake By Plaintiff
Off Calendar Nov-16-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF TYRONE YOUNGS Notice To Correct Mistake By Plaintiff is OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and 1013. Also, this request is moot order sustaining the demurrer with leave to amend entered on November 10, 2015. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-21-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No apperance by either side.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurrer. Plaintiff shall have 10 days from notice of entry of order to file an amended complaint. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order that conforms to the tentative approved as to form or in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: N. Wong; Not Reported. (501)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-21-2015 Text Ruling

Plaintiff shall have 10 days from notice of entry of order to file an amended complaint. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order that conforms to the tentative approved as to form or in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: N. Wong; Not Reported. (501)
